英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Giffard於1367年4月出生在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Giffard22歲，母親Elizabeth Missenden28歲。他於1383年7月6日與Joan Beresford結婚。他去世於1409年4月14日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Giffard于1367年4月出生在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Giffard22岁，母亲Elizabeth Missenden28岁。他于1383年7月6日与Joan Beresford结婚。他去世于1409年4月14日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Giffard was born in April 1367, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Giffard, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Missenden, was 28. He married Joan Beresford on 6 July 1383. He died on 14 April 1409, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Giffard est né en avril 1367, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Giffard, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Missenden, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Beresford le 6 juillet 1383. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1409, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Giffard im April 1367 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Giffard 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Missenden 28. Er hat am 6. Juli 1383 Joan Beresford geheiratet. Er starb am 14. April 1409 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Giffard è nato il nel aprile 1367 nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Giffard, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Missenden, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Beresford il 6 luglio 1383. Morì il 14 aprile 1409, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Giffardが1367年4月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Giffardは22歳，母Elizabeth Missendenは28歳であった。1383年7月6日にJoan Beresfordと結婚した。彼は1409年4月14日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Giffard(이)가 1367년 4월 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Giffard(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Missenden(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1383년 7월 6일 Joan Beresford(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1409년 4월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Giffard nasceu em abril de 1367, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Giffard, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Missenden, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Beresford em 6 de julho de 1383. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1409, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Giffard родился апрель 1367 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Giffard было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Missenden, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Beresford 6 июля 1383 г. Он умер 14 апреля 1409 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Giffard nació en abril de 1367, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Giffard, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Missenden, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan Beresford el 6 de julio de 1383. Murió el 14 de abril de 1409, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
